ai/tailwind-color-overuse._calibrationNote: v0.14.5b: rule implemented per Sascha 2025 ('Six Models, One React Stack') + Douglas 2025 ('AI 正在 Tailwind 化'). Detects over-representation of default Tailwind palette (blue-500, slate-50, rounded-lg, shadow-md, p-4/6/8). DORMANT until v7 calibration lands.

ai/default-react-stack._calibrationNote: v0.14.5b: rule implemented per Sascha 2025 (9/9 LLMs default to Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + TanStack Query + Zustand) + Nam et al. MSR 2026 (27% of AI directives mention Tailwind, 18% mention shadcn/ui). Detects ≥3 of these packages imported in a single file. DORMANT until v7 calibration lands.

ai/library-reinvention._calibrationNote: v0.14.5b: rule implemented per GitClear 2025 (AI code has 4× higher code churn rate; reinvention is a major contributor) + Cui et al. 2025 (30.1% of new code is AI-generated). Detects ≥2 of: custom date-picker, form-validation, chart, modal, toast, tabs, select, accordion — without importing the canonical library. DORMANT until v7 calibration lands.

ai/state-default-overuse._calibrationNote: v0.14.5b: rule implemented per Sascha 2025 (LLMs produce 2022-era patterns; useState is the default even when useReducer or Zustand/Jotai would be appropriate). Detects ≥5 useState with 0 useReducer and 0 state library imports. DORMANT until v7 calibration lands.

ai/fetch-default-overuse._calibrationNote: v0.14.5b: rule implemented per Sascha 2025 (every top LLM puts TanStack Query in default stack but still defaults to raw fetch when no library is installed) + Nam et al. MSR 2026 (27% of AI directives mention TanStack Query). Detects ≥3 direct fetch() calls with no TanStack Query / SWR / axios / ky import. DORMANT until v7 calibration lands.

ai/console-debug-storm._calibrationNote: v0.14.5b: rule implemented per GitClear 2025 (AI code has 4× higher churn; console.log debug statements often left in by AI 'thinking out loud'). Detects ≥10 console.* / debugger statements with no structured logger (winston, pino, debug, consola). DORMANT until v7 calibration lands.
